# Getting Help

## Discord (questions, usage, discussion)

Join the [TRaSH Guides Discord](https://trash-guides.info/discord) and head to **[#clonarr](https://discordapp.com/channels/492590071455940612/1495685561552207913)** under Community Apps. This is the best place for:

- Usage questions
- Help interpreting Custom Format scoring
- Feature requests and suggestions
- General Clonarr + TRaSH Guides discussion

## GitHub Issues (bugs)

[File a bug report](https://github.com/prophetse7en/clonarr/issues/new) if you hit a reproducible problem. Please include:

- Clonarr version (Settings → About)
- Radarr/Sonarr version
- Steps to reproduce
- Debug log if relevant (enable in Settings → Logging)

## Documentation

- [README](../README.md) — install, features, quick start
- [CHANGELOG](../CHANGELOG.md) — what's new per release
- [TRaSH Guides](https://trash-guides.info) — the source of all Custom Format / Quality Profile content Clonarr syncs
